segments.text: India versus Pakistan. Air force only. Who wins?
Start with total aircraft. India leads with about 2,183. Pakistan has about 1,397.
Fighter aircraft are closer, but India still leads. 476 versus 331.
Attack aircraft also go to India. 124 versus 90.
Helicopter strength gives India another edge. 594 versus 379.
Special mission aircraft matter for surveillance and coordination. India has 72. Pakistan has 27.
One surprise: trainer aircraft actually favor Pakistan. 563 versus 334.
So for total airpower, India is ahead in scale, fighters, attack aircraft, helicopters, and support platforms.
Pakistan stays dangerous in a direct contest, but by the numbers, India wins the air force showdown.
